title: Selector Contracts Manifest
description: Manifest for selector contracts that expose focused report or query sections.

canonical_doc.description: Canonical doc text value used by this contract.

profile.description: Profile text value used by this contract.

items.description: One entry in the answer shape list.

answer_shape.description: Ordered answer shape entries used by this contract.

surface.description: Surface text value used by this contract.

selector_key.description: Selector key text value used by this contract.

command.description: Command string or command name used by this contract.

additionalProperties.description: Named entry in the selectors mapping.

selectors.description: Selectors details used by this contract.
